description:
Lab worker Luna has reported a new pregnancy. She routinely handles teratogenic chemicals in the lab. As the Occupational Health and Safety Technician, complete the Fetal Protection Protocol in GNU Health. Document her pregnancy diagnosis (ICD-10 O09, Z33, or Z34) and her occupational chemical exposure hazard (ICD-10 Z57.x) as active conditions. Prescribe a prenatal supplement (Folic Acid, Iron, or Prenatal Vitamin) and order at least two baseline maternity lab tests (e.g., CBC, Urinalysis, Blood typing, or hCG). In her Lifestyle section, create a record with a note containing 'work restriction' or 'reassignment' due to teratogen exposure.

Login credentials:
- URL: http://localhost:8000/
- Database: health50
- Username: admin
- Password: gnusolidario

Ensure all records are saved.
